headline: 痴迷领跑今日娱乐热点
summary: 今日无新片上映，但《痴迷》《末日地堡》《福尔摩斯小姐3》等作品热度高涨，本周新片仅一部。
summaryEn: No new movies today, but "Obsession," "Silo," and "Enola Holmes 3" trend high; only 1 new film this week.

industryHighlights.en: Only one new film released this week

industryHighlights.text: 《穿普拉达的女王2》持续受关注
industryHighlights.en: "The Devil Wears Prada 2" continues to draw attention
Upcoming titles like "Avatar: The Last Airbender" on the horizon
